content:
The user wants me to extract the content of the image into a JSON format. **1. Analyze the image:** The image is a technical datasheet for a "Shielded Power Inductors – XAL7030". It contains: - A title and product name. - A graph showing "Typical L vs Frequency". - A diagram showing the physical dimensions and terminal directions. - A table listing "Dash number", "Terminal width", and "Land pattern width". - Contact information for Coilcraft. - Document number and revision date. **2. Break down the content into logical sections:** * **Header:** "HIGH TEMPERATURE", "Document 863-2" * **Product Title:** "Shielded Power Inductors – XAL7030" * **Sub-title:** "Typical L vs Frequency" * **Logos:** RoHS/REACH, Halogen Free, AEC Q200 +125°C * **Graph:** * Y-axis: Inductance (µH) * X-axis: Frequency (MHz) * Curves: Various inductance values (10 µH, 8.2 µH, 6.8 µH, 5.6 µH, 4.7 µH, 3.3 µH, 2.7 µH, 2.2 µH, 1.5 µH, 1.0 µH, 0.60 µH, 0.30 µH, 0.16 µH) * **Diagram:** * Shows the component with dimensions (0.295 ±0.020 / 7.5 ±0.5). * Indicates terminal direction. * Shows recommended land pattern dimensions. * **Table:** * Columns: Dash number, Terminal width (in / mm), Land pattern width (in / mm) * Rows: Data for various dash numbers (-161, -301, -601, etc.) * **Footer:** * Coilcraft logo and website. * Contact info for US, UK, Taiwan, China, Singapore. * Document info: "Document 863-2 Revised 12/16/25" * Disclaimer text. **3. Construct the JSON:** * Start with the main title and product info. * Include the graph data as a description or representation. * Include the diagram description. * Convert the table into a markdown table. * Add the footer information. **Drafting the JSON:** ```json [{"bbox": [93, 11, 364, 70], "category": "header", "text": "HIGH TEMPERATURE"}, {"bbox": [776, 9, 915, 26], "category": "header", "text": "Document 863-2"}, {"bbox": [19, 78, 68, 135], "category": "logo", "text": "RoHS/REACH COMPLIANT"}, {"bbox": [84, 82, 587, 114], "category": "title", "text": "Shielded Power Inductors – XAL7030"}, {"bbox": [85, 122, 315, 147], "category": "title", "text": "Typical L vs Frequency"}, {"bbox": [19, 142, 68, 201], "category": "icon", "text": "Halogen Free"}, {"bbox": [19, 208, 68, 266], "category": "icon", "text": "AEC Q200 +125°C"}, {"bbox": [85, 150, 486, 389], "category": "graph", "text": "Graph showing Inductance (µH) vs Frequency (MHz). Y-axis ranges from 0.1 to 100 µH. X-axis ranges from 0.1 to 100 MHz. Curves represent inductance values of 10 µH, 8.2 µH, 6.8 µH, 5.6 µH, 4.7 µH, 3.3 µH, 2.7 µH, 2.2 µH, 1.5 µH, 1.0 µH, 0.60 µH, 0.30 µH, and 0.16 µH."}, {"bbox": [514, 122, 797, 269], "category": "figure", "text": "Diagram showing the component dimensions and terminal orientation. Dimensions are 0.295 ±0.020 / 7.5 ±0.5. An arrow indicates the direction of terminals and start (short) lead. Connect high dv/dt here for lowest EMI."}, {"bbox": [519, 277, 692, 362], "category": "figure", "text": "Diagram showing recommended land pattern dimensions. Width is 0.123 ±0.010 / 3.12 ±0.25. See table for other dimensions."}, {"bbox": [724, 268, 912, 341], "category": "figure", "text": "Diagram showing recommended land pattern dimensions. Width is 0.122 max / 3.1. Length is 0.236 typ / 6.0."}, {"bbox": [514, 367, 678, 500], "category": "figure", "text": "Diagram showing recommended land pattern dimensions. Width is 0.116 / 2.94. Length is 0.256 / 6.50. See table for other dimensions."}, {"bbox": [521, 504, 635, 533], "category": "title", "text": "Recommended Land Pattern"}, {"bbox": [791, 515, 912, 534], "category": "text", "text": "Dimensions are in inches mm"}, {"bbox": [520, 544, 746, 710], "category": "table", "text": "
Dash numberTerminal width ±0.004 / ±0,10 (in / mm)Land pattern width (in / mm)

"}, {"bbox": [86, 919, 279, 963], "category": "footer", "text": "Coilcraft"}, {"bbox": [149, 965, 275, 978], "category": "footer", "text": "www.coilcraft.com"}, {"bbox": [329, 917, 642, 979], "category": "footer", "text": "US +1-847-639-6400 sales@coilcraft.com\nUK +44-1236-730595 sales@coilcraft-europe.com\nTaiwan +886-2-2264 3646 sales@coilcraft.com.tw\nChina +86-21-6218 8074 sales@coilcraft.com.cn\nSingapore + 65-6484 8412 sales@coilcraft.com.sg"}, {"bbox": [696, 917, 915, 978], "category": "footer", "text": "Document 863-2 Revised 12/16/25\n© Coilcraft Inc. 2025\nThis product may not be used in medical or high risk applications without prior Coilcraft approval.\nSpecification subject to change without notice.\nPlease check web site for latest information."}] ```
